message:
bench: register 2 orphaned benches, add EventDeduplicator benchmark

- Register notification_coalescing and tailer benchmarks in Cargo.toml
  (files existed but had no [[bench]] entries)
- Add event_dedup.rs: 4 Criterion benchmarks for EventDeduplicator and
  NotificationCooldown throughput (duplicate hits, new key insertion,
  eviction at capacity, cooldown check)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -469,6 +469,19 @@ harness = false
 name = "rate_limit_ops"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "notification_coalescing"
+harness = false
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "tailer"
+harness = false
+required-features = ["asupersync-runtime"]
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "event_dedup"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
